title: PayBae and Lacy controversy explained after questionable Streamer University 2026 interaction
summary_full: Streamer University 2026 saw controversy involving Twitch streamer PayBae and Nick Lacy.  A video showed PayBae pulling Lacy's injured leg, causing him pain.  Lacy questioned why his injury was not respected during the incident.  PayBae apologized but felt the situation was being amplified by Lacy's audience.  She also claimed a prior "fake beef" influenced her reaction.
